title: NickName Changer
description: Ever wanted to see your own nametag? Now you can. Instant nicknames, effortless skin swapping, and 1.21.4 optimized rendering—all in one lightweight package.
body:
# 🎭 NickName Changer: Unmatched Identity Control

Tired of being a ghost in F5? **NickName Changer** is the only tool you need to take total control over how you—and everyone else—look on your screen. No more invisible nametags. No more boring skins.

### ⚡ The "Main" Features:
* **🏷️ Force-Render Nametags:** Bypasses hardcoded vanilla logic. Finally see your own custom name floating above your head in third-person (F5) mode.
* **👕 Instant Identity Theft:** Copy any online player's skin textures instantly. Just type the name, hit save, and you're wearing it.
* **🕵️ Global Stealth:** Hide everyone else's skins or rename every player on the server to a custom name (like "Player") to clean up your view and boost FPS.
* **⌨️ Total Customization:** A sleek, centered UI with a fully rebindable shortcut. Don't like F6? Set it to whatever fits your playstyle.

### 🚀 Built for the SMP Grind
Optimized specifically for high-population servers like **DonutSMP**. While other mods choke and freeze your PC trying to load player data, NickName Changer uses a lightweight scan-and-cache system. 
* **Zero Lag.** 
* **Zero Connection Resets.**
* **Pure Performance.**

### 🛠️ Universal Support
Why download multiple mods for different updates? One single JAR file provides a "No-Fail" experience across **every version from 1.21 to 1.21.11.** Whether you're on the legacy 1.21.1 or the modern 1.21.4 rendering engine, it just works.

---
**How to use:**
1. Open the menu (Default: **F6**).
2. Set your alias and target skin.
3. Hit **DONE** and flex in F5.
*(Requires Fabric API)*
